response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A woman wearing glasses and a Santa hat holds a toddler in her arms outdoors at night, captured with the casual, unplanned energy of a vernacular snapshot. The child wears a light-colored hooded coat, striped leggings, and white shoes. Behind them, bushes are decorated with red string lights. A sickly green color cast pervades the entire frame, shifting skin tones and surfaces toward an unhealthy, contaminated hue, while harsh direct flash flattens the illumination and casts hard shadows. A watermark reading "dpchallenge.com" appears in the upper left corner.
